title: ProfileAtom
description: User meta-cognitive profile atom (kind='profile'). V2.x bootstrap-skill (2026-04). SINGLETON: exactly one active profile per data dir, id=atom_profile_main, file path <dataDir>/atoms/profile/main/atom_profile_main.json (D-010). Historic snapshots are kept inline in `previous_versions[]` (new→old) instead of supersede chains (D-008): profile MUST NOT use supersededBy / supersedes — use applyProfileEvolution() in scripts/lib/evolution.mjs to evolve. Wrote by atomsyn-cli bootstrap commit, atomsyn-cli profile-calibrate, or GUI calibration page. v1: read/mentor do NOT consume this atom until user explicitly calibrates verified=true (D-007).

id.description: Singleton convention: id MUST be `atom_profile_main`. Pattern accepts other slugs for fixtures / multi-tenant testing only.

name.description: Human-readable label (e.g. '用户元认知画像 - 2026-04-26'). Updated when user re-calibrates.

verified.description: D-007: v1 仅观察 — true means user has gone through the GUI calibration flow at least once (POST /atoms/:id/calibrate-profile). v2 will gate read/mentor profile injection on this flag.

verifiedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when user last set verified=true. Feeds the 90-day staleness reminder (cognitive-evolution computeStaleness profile_factor 1.5x when > 90 days).

inferred_at.description: When the current top-level snapshot was first inferred by bootstrap / calibration. Independent of createdAt (which never moves).

source_summary.description: Short human summary of what was scanned to build this profile. e.g. 'Scanned ~/Documents, 240 markdowns, 18-month range.' Does NOT contain raw user content (privacy).

identity.description: Who the user is. Free-form text fields for human storytelling, not enums.

role.description: e.g. '前端工程师 + 独立产品开发者'

working_style.description: e.g. '小步迭代 + 重视架构'

preferences.description: 5 numeric dimensions, 0-1, plan-tune compatible (D-008 of bootstrap-skill). Same names + same semantics as gstack plan-tune `~/.gstack/developer-profile.json` for future bidirectional ingest.

knowledge_domains.description: Free-form domains the user has accumulated knowledge in. e.g. ['前端工程', 'Rust/Tauri 桌面应用'].

recurring_patterns.description: One-line behavioral patterns the inference layer noticed. Each item is a self-contained sentence for the user to confirm/edit during calibration.

evidence_atom_ids.description: Atom ids that contributed evidence to the current snapshot. Used by GUI calibration page to show 'based on N atoms' link, letting the user audit each claim.

previous_versions.description: Stack of historical profile snapshots, NEW→OLD. Pushed by applyProfileEvolution() (D-008 + D-010) when bootstrap rerun / user calibration / agent evolution / restore happens. Replaces the supersede chain that other atom kinds use; profile MUST NOT use supersededBy/supersedes.

version.description: Monotonic ordinal of THIS historic snapshot (older entries have lower numbers).

supersededAt.description: When this snapshot was displaced by the new top-level version.

snapshot.description: Frozen copy of the previous top-level fields (preferences / identity / knowledge_domains / recurring_patterns / evidence_atom_ids).

trigger.description: What action displaced this snapshot. Mirrors VALID_PROFILE_TRIGGERS in scripts/lib/evolution.mjs.

evidence_delta.description: Optional metadata about what evidence changed (atom ids added / removed / re-weighted). Free shape; mentor v2 may consume.

lastAccessedAt.description: V2.x cognitive-evolution · ISO 8601 timestamp passively updated by atomsyn-cli when read/find hits this atom (throttled). Feeds confidence_decay calculation. For profile, also bumped by applyProfileEvolution() on every evolution.

archivedAt.description: V2.x cognitive-evolution · soft-delete timestamp. Singleton profile is rarely archived (invariant: 1 active profile), but field is shared for consistency.

archivedReason.description: V2.x cognitive-evolution · optional rationale captured when archiving.

stats.description: Standard stats block. For profile, viewedCount/aiInvokeCount stay near zero (read v1 doesn't inject). imported/bootstrap_session_id mark provenance.

imported.description: V2.x bootstrap-skill · True if this atom was created by atomsyn-cli bootstrap during a batch import. Profile created via bootstrap_initial → true; created purely by user GUI calibration → false.

bootstrap_session_id.description: V2.x bootstrap-skill · Session id of the bootstrap run that created this atom (null when imported=false).
